channel.title: Organizations on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in Organizations on Detention Pipeline

item.title: Blue Owl Capital — Private Equity Firm Profiting from ICE Warehouse Purchases
item.description: Blue Owl Capital ($307.5B AUM) sold distressed warehouses to DHS at multiples of market value. Stock crashed 68% amid $5.4B in redemption requests; DHS sales were a financial lifeline.

item.title: Carlyle Group — Oakwood GA Warehouse Seller, 22 Admin Officials Hold Investments
item.description: Carlyle Group sold the Oakwood, GA warehouse to DHS for $68.2M. 22 Trump officials hold Carlyle investments, including former Carlyle employee Todd Newnam now at Treasury.

item.title: Goldman Sachs — Double Exposure in ICE Warehouse Profiteering
item.description: Goldman Sachs has double ICE exposure: direct seller of Roxbury NJ ($129.3M, 137% markup) and lender on Williamsport MD ($352.7M refi). Combined Goldman-connected proceeds: $231.7M.

item.title: PNK Group — Russia-Founded Industrial Developer, Social Circle GA Seller, Sberbank Partner
item.description: Russia-founded industrial developer that sold Social Circle, GA warehouse to DHS for $128.6M after buying it for $29.4M. Founder Sharkov has Sberbank, Roscongress, and ICIJ offshore ties.

item.title: Project Salt Box — ICE Warehouse Overpayment Research and Tracking
item.description: Activist research org documenting ICE warehouse overpayments through property records and lien filings. Their data shows markups ranging from 137% to ~1000% across confirmed purchases.

item.title: Rockefeller Group (Mitsubishi Estate) — Surprise AZ Warehouse Seller
item.description: Mitsubishi Estate subsidiary that sold the Surprise, AZ warehouse to DHS for $70M vs ~$12M cost basis (483% markup). GardaWorld won the $313.4M conversion contract despite no detention experience.
